blended.narrative: Mt. Baker is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.5 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 1,036 ft. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 8" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 36.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 20" over the past week. Current depth: 91".
